summary: The diff implements Internet Identity authentication UI in the sidebar (Layout.tsx) using the useInternetIdentity hook, showing login/logout buttons and a truncated principal. Most REQ-18 acceptance criteria appear to be met. However, there is no evidence that the useActor hook integration with the authenticated identity was addressed.

missing_requirements.requirement: The useActor hook uses the authenticated identity so backend calls are made on behalf of the logged-in principal.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff only modifies Layout.tsx to add login/logout UI using useInternetIdentity. There is no evidence in the diff that useActor was wired up or that any component/page was updated to pass the authenticated identity to useActor for authenticated backend calls.
